value.found_quote: Use Codex code review to get another high-signal review pass on GitHub pull requests. Codex reviews the pull request diff, follows your repository guidance, and posts a standard GitHub code review focused on serious issues.
value.rationale: The page describes Codex integrating with GitHub to review pull requests (via @codex review) and starting cloud tasks when mentioning @codex with other instructions, matching the claim. No deprecation or sunset language is present, so it is treated as active.
